common.tenantText: Your platform is isolated under tenant workspace

auth.activationSuccessDesc: Welcome to HoaLang. Your account has been successfully verified. Redirecting you shortly.
auth.activationFailedDesc: Your verification link has expired or is invalid. Please register again to request a new link.

hero.title: Touch the Essence
hero.subtitle: A journey through traditional craft villages — where the hands of artisans preserve the soul of a thousand-year-old culture.

howItWorks.label: How It Works
howItWorks.title: Three steps to start your journey
howItWorks.step1Desc: Browse over 120 traditional craft villages across 8 cultural regions of Vietnam on an intuitive map.
howItWorks.step2Desc: Artificial intelligence analyzes your preferences and timing, generating a unique itinerary for each journey.
howItWorks.step3Desc: Join hands-on workshops with local artisans and bring home authentic, meaningful handcrafted items.

quote.text: Each pottery vase is a poem about clay — the artisan works in silence yet with nimble hands, creating eternity from what was once merely earth.
quote.author: Nguyen Van Binh
quote.title: Meritorious Artisan — Bat Trang Pottery Village

cta.label: Personalized Journey
cta.title: Let AI Craft Your Itinerary
cta.desc: Enter your email to receive a personalized craft village exploration itinerary, custom-tailored for you by HoaLang AI.
cta.successDesc: Your itinerary is being prepared — please check your email.
cta.footer: No account required  •  100% Free  •  4 languages supported

footer.desc: A platform connecting travel and preserving the heritage values of Vietnamese traditional craft villages. A journey to cherish the soul of the nation.
